projects.title: PrompTrend — LLM Vulnerability Discovery & Risk Scoring
projects.description: Designed a continuous, community-driven system to detect jailbreaks, prompt injections, and misuse across black-box LLM APIs. Focus on safe model behavior, evaluation pipelines, and reproducible benchmarking.
features: Adversarial testing for jailbreaks & prompt injection
projects.technicalDetails: Python services orchestrated with Docker; transformation-aware testing of black-box LLM APIs; scoring & reporting pipeline for risk triage.

projects.title: Equation Solver Chat Bot
projects.description: Built a chat bot using Python and Docker with a focus on reliable execution and contained deployments.
features: Integration with Docker for easy deployment
projects.technicalDetails: Utilized Python for backend processing with containerized services to isolate computation and simplify deployment.

projects.title: Virus Propagation Simulation Covid-19
projects.description: Developed a simulation using Python, Graph Theory, and Probability to analyze spread dynamics and control strategies.
projects.technicalDetails: Graph-based algorithms and stochastic processes to simulate propagation under varying constraints.

projects.title: Management Software for Law Firm
projects.description: Developed a management system that cut legal file processing time by ~40% with secure handling of sensitive records.
projects.technicalDetails: MERN stack with Express API and React frontend; data model designed for case files, deadlines, and activity logs.

projects.title: Messenger-Live Messaging Application
projects.description: Built a Slack-like real-time messaging app with channels, profiles, and presence.
projects.technicalDetails: WebSocket for bidirectional events; React client and Node.js services with MongoDB persistence.

projects.title: Tutoring Applications
projects.description: Cross-platform tutoring app connecting students and tutors with chat, scheduling, and resource sharing.
features: Live chat between students and tutors
projects.technicalDetails: React Native mobile client; Node.js/Express backend; relational schema in MySQL for sessions, users, and availability.
